shulker_box.title: Craft a Shulker Box for portable persistent storage

void_fly.title: Fly across the void between three separate outer island clusters using the Elytra

mending_elytra.title: Apply Mending to your Elytra (use Immersive Enchanting — requires Ancient Books, NOT vanilla bookshelves)

subtitle.text: The void is not a floor. It is a medium. Navigate accordingly.

description: The Elytra + firework rockets make the outer islands traversable.
Without them, island-hopping requires massive amounts of bridging material.
Shulker Boxes are portable — they keep their contents when broken.
Bring several. The End has loot in every City chest.
You cannot carry it all in inventory.
Mending on the Elytra is critical for long expeditions.
Immersive Enchanting uses Ancient Books found in structures with Chiseled Bookshelves.
Standard vanilla bookshelves do not work with Immersive Enchanting.
Look for Chiseled Bookshelf clusters in dungeons and advanced structures.
Fly between island clusters — not just one jump.
Get used to the void as a medium, not a hazard.
→ Fly across void between three island clusters [check]
